Coming Events

April 1994
Journalism & Newsroom

A listing of upcoming journalism training and conference events for 2024, including NICAR seminars, IRE conferences, and computer-assisted reporting workshops scheduled across multiple U.S. locations.

Coming Events

May 15-20 NICAR Training Seminar Columbia, Missouri June 16-19 IRE National Conference St. Louis, Missouri August 14-19 NICAR Training Seminar Columbia, Missouri October 6-9 IRE Computer-Assisted Reporting Conference San Jose, California
